---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new validation rule or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: theluckystrike
---

DESCRIPTION

A clear summary of the feature or validation rule you want added.

USE CASE

Explain the Chrome extension scenario where this would help. Link to relevant Chrome documentation if applicable.

PROPOSED BEHAVIOR

Describe how the validator should handle the new case, including what severity level (error, warning, info) makes sense and why.
